description_long: This is a dark green baseball cap with a slightly worn and crumpled appearance, featuring a curved brim and a structured crown. The front panel displays a white embroidered logo with stylized text and horizontal lines, adding a distinctive urban flair. The cap has a fabric-covered button at the top and visible stitching along the seams, contributing to its classic design. At the back, there is an adjustable strap with a metal buckle, allowing for size customization. The material appears to be a soft, flexible fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, with a matte finish. The overall look suggests casual, everyday use, suitable for urban environments.
description: A dark green baseball cap with a white embroidered logo on the front, curved brim, and adjustable strap at the back. The cap has a soft, slightly worn fabric and classic urban style.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the white embroidered logo, curved brim, and the cap's structured crown.
description_view_1: Left-rear view highlighting the crumpled fabric and the adjustable strap with metal buckle.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the adjustable strap, buckle, and the fabric-covered button at the crown.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the logo, brim, and the overall shape of the cap.
attribute_crown_shape: rounded, structured crown with a fabric-covered button
